title: 10 PCS Jar Seals, Jar Lids, Leakproof Silicone Jar Seals Replacement, for Sealing Glass Jars, Storage Jars, Mason Jars (Orange)
features: [Excellent Sealing]: Our jar lids has excellent air tightness and sealing performance, which can effectively isolate air, moisture, and dust, extending the shelf life of your fruits, vegetables, jams, sauces, and snacks

[Widely Applicable]: The silicone jar seals has an inner diameter of 70mm, an outer diameter of 95mm, and a thickness of 2mm, almost adapting to glass jars, food storage jars, and Mason jars of different capacities
[Safe and Durable]: Made of high-quality food grade silicone material, safe and healthy, soft and durable, it will not absorb or release any odors, ensuring that your food is authentic

[Easy to Operate]: Extremely easy to use, just gently pull, the jar seals replacement can expand and tightly adhere to the inside of the can lid. This design can effectively prevent air from entering and reduce food oxidation

[Satisfaction Guarantee]: Each set includes 10 jar seals to meet your daily replacement needs, making it an ideal choice for home storage, kitchen storage, and DIY enthusiasts, ensuring a pleasant and worry free shopping experience
